title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Flipkart Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
